# Text

**Data field**

The subtitle text.

## Overview

The subtitle text is Unicode text, encoded either as UTF-8 text or UTF-16 text beginning with a UTF-16 BYTE ORDER MARK (`'\uFEFF'`) in big or little endian order. There is no null termination for the text.

## Data fields

- **Text size**: A 16-bit word that specifies the length (number of bytes) of the subtitle text.
- **Sample extensions**: One or more atoms containing additional information for selecting and drawing the subtitle.
